name: io.github.emiliaprotocol/mcp-server
description: Trust & human sign-off for AI agents: verify Trust Receipts offline, check entity trust profiles before transacting, and require a named human approval before an agent takes an irreversible action (release a payment, change a record, deploy).

environmentVariables.name: EP_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional API key for write operations (registering entities, submitting receipts). Public read tools work without it.
